question_template: If the observer rotates {angle_deg} degrees to the {turn_dir}, which marked object would appear closest to the image center?
answer_rule: Apply rotation; project marked objects to image plane; choose object with projected x closest to image center among visible objects.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Reference template only. Adapt field names to your generator.
